Off Calendar Jun-21-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. NATHAN AMERBERG, Esq. of Amerberg Law Group, APLC (Tel: 424-433-5363) as movant/counsel-of-record for plaintiff;
No other appearances are made in this matter.

HEARING RE: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD RE: PLAINTIFF FLORINDA SANTOS.

Matter called. Court passes matter to conduct an unreported in camera conference call at 10:00 a.m.

Court conducts an unreported in camera conference call with Mr. Amerberg. The Court rules as follows: Attorney Nathan Amberg's motion to be relieved as counsel for plaintiff Florinda Santos is granted. Movant to prepare and submit a proposed order using the mandatory judicial council form.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
